untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific chart pattern formation (unspecified pattern type with Bollinger Band reference) and pattern-to-breakout timing (3-5 week delay). These require pattern recognition logic not available in allowed indicators. Additionally, exact stop loss level is marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source. Used proxy conditions: price crossing above SMA (trend confirmation), ADX > 25 (bull market confirmation), and 20% profit target (accounting for 5% cost). Actual pattern detection and formation timing cannot be implemented with available indicators.
translation_notes: Entry proxies: close crosses above sma_50 approximates 'breakout in bull market'; adx_14 > 25 confirms strong uptrend. Exit target of 20% return represents the 25% gross target minus 5% trading cost. Stop loss set to 5% to match mentioned trading cost, but original signal does not specify stop loss level. Hold period set to 35 days (midpoint of 3-5 week range converted to trading days). Pattern formation timing cannot be coded without explicit pattern detection rules.
